arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all seven games on Saturday
arts.sum: The Premier League reaches matchday 20 this weekend and James Mason has collated our writers' best bets for all seven games being played on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola targets Bundesliga hotshot in bid to shore up his creaking squad this month - but there WON'T be a clearout of struggling stars
arts.sum: Txiki Begiristain's final market as sporting director is set to be busier than the Basque will have envisioned when informing the champions that he would depart at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Man City vs. West Ham: 'There's a good chance he might be benched' - Pep Guardiola to replace out-of-form City man with James McAtee?
arts.sum: An out-of-form Man City player is at risk of being benched by Pep Guardiola for Saturday's Premier League clash with West Ham United at the Etihad Stadium, Citizens expert Steven McInerney tells Sports Mole.

arts.ttl: James McAtee: "The penny might have finally dropped" as Pep Guardiola urged to avoid "really bad" Cole Palmer, Morgan Rogers Man City repeat
arts.sum: "The penny might have finally dropped" for Man City manager Pep Guardiola regarding his use of James McAtee as a first-team player, Citizens expert Steven McInerney from Esteemed Kompany tells Sports Mole.

arts.ttl: Rodri Fires Back at Cristiano Ronaldo's Ballon d'Or Criticism
arts.sum: Rodri hit back at Cristiano Ronaldo's recent claims that Vinícius Júnior deserved to win the 2024 Ballon d'Or.

arts.ttl: Man City plans for 19-year-old Argentine talent 'confirmed'
arts.sum: Claudio Echeverri has been tipped to link up with Manchester City from next month, having spent the past year on loan at home in Argentina.

arts.ttl: Lopetegui shares Jarrod Bowen fitness update ahead of West Ham v Manchester City
arts.sum: Julen Lopetegui is not putting a timeframe on Jarrod Bowen’s recovery but is not ruling out a return within weeks rather than months. Bowen picked... The post Lopetegui shares Jarrod Bowen fitness update ahead of West Ham v Manchester City appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: Player has returned to Manchester City after ‘re-evaluation’ of loan – Missed training to go back to Etihad
arts.sum: Defender Issa Kaboré is ‘no longer a Benfica player’ and has returned to Manchester City from his loan spell at the Portuguese side. That’s according to Record, who reports that the defender has been sent back to Etihad after a ‘re-evaluation’ between Manchester City and Benfica.
